headline: Myriad Uranium Commences Phase II Drilling at Copper Mountain
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - July 2, 2026) - Myriad Uranium Corp. (CSE: M) (OTCQB: MYRUF) (FSE: C3Q) ("Myriad" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that Phase II drilling at the Copper Mountain Uranium Project in Wyoming has commenced.HighlightsPhase II drilling is now underway at the Copper Mountain Uranium Project in Wyoming. The first four holes will test mineralization at Lucky Cliff, a high-priority target area drilled by Union Pacific in the late 1970s and never...
